title: MiniMax LLM Provider & Test Suite

production_classes.name: LLMSession
production_classes.notes: Delegates streaming to _openai_stream(); stores api_base, api_key, model, temperature, max_tokens, max_retries, connect_timeout, read_timeout, proxies

production_classes.name: NativeOAISession
production_classes.notes: Overrides raw_ask to use _openai_stream instead of Claude HTTP. ask() extracts <think>/<thinking> tags → MockResponse

production_classes.name: NativeClaudeSession
production_classes.notes: ask() calls raw_ask, extracts <think(?:ing)?> via regex, builds MockResponse with thinking/content/tool_calls

production_classes.name: ToolClient
production_classes.notes: chat() calls backend.ask() then _parse_mixed_response(). Handles <think>/<thinking> stripping in _parse_mixed_response

production_classes.name: NativeToolClient
production_classes.notes: Mirrors ToolClient but wraps NativeOAISession/NativeClaudeSession. Forwards MockResponse with think-tag extraction

free_functions.name: _openai_stream
free_functions.signature: _openai_stream(api_base, api_key, messages, model, api_mode='chat_completions', *, temperature=0.5, max_tokens, tools, reasoning_effort, max_retries, connect_timeout, read_timeout, proxies) -> generator
free_functions.minimax_logic: if 'minimax' in model.lower(): temperature = max(0.01, min(temperature, 1.0))
free_functions.notes: Core HTTP streaming fn. Sends POST to chat/completions or responses endpoint. Yields text chunks, returns list[content_block]

free_functions.name: auto_make_url
free_functions.notes: Appends /v1 if missing; strips trailing $ anchor; joins base+path

free_functions.name: compress_history_tags
free_functions.notes: Truncates <think>/<thinking> content in old messages; triggered every 5 calls via _cd counter

test_classes.name: TestMiniMaxNativeOAISessionThinkTag
test_methods: test_think_tag_extracted_in_native_oai: mocked raw_ask returns <think>…</think> → MockResponse.thinking populated, content cleaned

test_classes.name: TestMiniMaxNativeToolClientThinkTag
test_methods: test_native_tool_client_think_tag: chat() with mocked session.ask → MockResponse.thinking + content

test_classes.name: TestMiniMaxEndToEnd
test_methods: test_full_pipeline_with_think_tag: SSE chunks w/ <think> → response.thinking contains text, content clean

test_classes.name: TestMiniMaxLive
test_methods: test_live_chat_completion: real API call, session.raw_ask, verifies 'hello' in response
test_live_tool_client_pipeline: real API, ToolClient.chat, verifies '4' in response
test_live_streaming_chunks: real API, session.ask(stream=False), checks '1','2','3' in result

important_notes: MiniMax temperature clamped to (0.01, 1.0] inside _openai_stream via model name check (case-insensitive 'minimax').
Kimi/Moonshot temperature is hard-forced to 1.0 (different branch from MiniMax).
<think>...</think> (MiniMax) and <thinking>...</thinking> (Claude) both handled by same regex in ask()/chat().
Integration tests mock requests.post at 'llmcore.requests.post' with SSE line iterators.
compress_history_tags uses a call-counter (_cd) to avoid running every invocation.
_make_sse_response helper in integration tests builds realistic SSE byte lines including usage chunk.
